source: artifacts/runs/PG-theorem-Murphy/00_input/source.pdf (Andy Jones, "A Clearer Proof of the Policy Gradient Theorem", pages 1-4)
notes: The source supplies the algebraic policy-gradient proof. The exported Lean statement is intentionally strengthened with explicit local differentiability and local Bellman-identity hypotheses at theta, following artifacts/runs/PG-theorem-Murphy/01_enrichment/review.md, because the PDF does not itself formalize the analytic interchange steps.
